apps.name: Adobe Photoshop
apps.reason: Full-featured photo editing and design app with powerful AI tools like Generative Fill and Expand. Excellent subject and background selection. Industry standard, but requires a subscription.

apps.name: Luminar Neo
apps.reason: AI-powered photo editor ideal for professional photographers. Easy to use with an intuitive interface and a wide range of AI tools for background removal, lighting enhancement, and generative AI. Available as a standalone app or plugin.

apps.name: Canva
apps.reason: AI-powered design app with a suite of Magic AI tools, including Magic Eraser, Edit, Grab, Expand, and Morph. Great for quick social media edits and design modifications. Free plan available with limited access to AI tools.

apps.name: PicsArt
apps.reason: All-inclusive AI photo editing app with a user-friendly interface. Offers background removal, image enhancement, customizable doodles and stickers, and text-to-image generation. Suitable for beginners and social media influencers.

apps.name: Pixlr
apps.reason: Easy-to-use online AI editor with a Photoshop-like interface. Offers a range of AI-powered tools, including AI Face Swap, AI Remove Object, and Generative Expand. One of the cheapest AI photo editor apps with a limited free version.

apps.name: Fotor
apps.reason: Excellent choice for users seeking quick yet professional results. Combines powerful AI capabilities with an intuitive interface. Offers AI-powered color adjustment, brightness control, and face/eye enhancement. Free online photo editor with AI tools.

apps.name: PhotoDirector
apps.reason: Intuitive AI-powered photo editor with hundreds of styles, effects, templates, and tools. Offers AI Removal, AI Expand, and AI Hairstyle. Features AI Anime and Image to Video. Suitable for creating stunning images with AI.

apps.name: Photoroom
apps.reason: AI photo editor for product photos and marketing assets. Offers auto background removal, AI backgrounds, and logo generation. Suitable for small businesses and creative teams.

apps.name: Lensa AI
apps.reason: Known for its selfie enhancement and artistic filters. Offers AI portrait retouching, background editing, and avatar creation. Great for experimenting with different styles and artistic effects.

apps.name: Remini
apps.reason: Specializes in photo enhancement and restoration. Ideal for bringing low-quality images back to life. Offers AI photo enhancement, portrait mode, and artistic filters. Great for enhancing old photos with minimal effort.

apps.name: YouCam Enhance
apps.reason: AI-powered photo editing tool for versatile and user-friendly image enhancement. Offers automatic noise reduction, sharpening, and color correction. Suitable for social media content creation.

apps.name: AirBrush
apps.reason: User-friendly photo and video editing tool with advanced AI technology. Offers photo enhancements, video upscaling, object removal, and background editing. Delivers professional-quality results effortlessly.

apps.name: Invideo AI
apps.reason: AI video editor that simplifies the video editing process. Uses AI scripts to make edits, saving time and avoiding complex video editors. Offers realistic voiceovers and AI visuals. Suitable for creating inspiring videos with AI.

apps.name: Filmora
apps.reason: Traditional video editing tool with AI features. Offers AI smart cutout, audio denoise, audio stretch, motion tracking, and background removal. Lots of learning resources are available.

apps.name: Captions AI
apps.reason: AI video editor that automates key editing tasks. Detects shot changes and automatically adds transitions. Offers features like subtitle generation and automatic transcription. Simplifies video production for content creators.

apps.name: Runway
apps.reason: AI video enhancer for experimenting with generative AI. Offers a unique toolbox of AI video generation features. Easy to control the AI model.

apps.name: Gling
apps.reason: AI video editing software designed for YouTube creators. Automatically cuts out bad takes, silent moments, filler words, and background noise.

apps.name: LightCut
apps.reason: Free AI video editor with rich video templates and video effects. Offers AI video editing with one tap and Inspire Cam for shooting stunning videos. Suitable for both beginners and professional users.

apps.name: Vivid Glam
apps.reason: AI video editing app that dramatically improves the quality of your videos. Uses powerful AI video enhancement, AI color correction, and stylish filters.

apps.name: UpFoto
apps.reason: AI Photo Enhancer that turns old photos into high definition. Uses AI to unblur, restore, upscale and enhance any image
